headline: Meta Reframes Growth Story As AI Agents Replace Metaverse Focus
summary: Meta Platforms (NasdaqGS:META) is accelerating internal deployment of AI agents, including a personal AI chief of staff for CEO Mark Zuckerberg. The company is restructuring its organization while retiring the Horizon Worlds VR platform as a flagship metaverse effort. Meta is hiring high profile AI startup founders as it shifts focus toward integrating AI across products and internal workflows. For investors, this marks a clear turn in how Meta frames its core business. A company that once...

headline: Roblox’s Hit Game ‘Steal A Brainrot’ Battles Its Many Imitators
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the popular video game Steal A Brainrot, the object is petty theft. But now that the internet is awash with knockoffs of the runaway Roblox Corp. hit, its makers are defending their turf.Since November, Steal A Brainrot developers Spyder Games and Speedy Simulator Gaming have filed at least four lawsuits against alleged imposters. headline: Slash Launches Meta Invoice Cashback Program to Replace Lost Card Rewards for Advertisers
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 24, 2026--Slash Financial, Inc., the business banking platform built for high-spend companies, has announced a Meta Invoice Cashback program that restores rewards for advertisers who lost access to credit card points and cashback rewards when Meta moved them to invoice-based billing. Through Slash, businesses can now earn 1% cashback on eligible Meta ad invoice payments made via ACH, wire, FedNow, or SWIFT.

content.title: Slash Launches Meta Invoice Cashback Program to Replace Lost Card Rewards for Advertisers
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 24, 2026--Slash Financial, Inc., the business banking platform built for high-spend companies, has announced a Meta Invoice Cashback program that restores rewards for advertisers who lost access to credit card points and cashback rewards when Meta moved them to invoice-based billing. Through Slash, businesses can now earn 1% cashback on eligible Meta ad invoice payments made via ACH, wire, FedNow, or SWIFT.

headline: OpenAI Aggressively Courts Private Equity Firms to Gain Edge Over Anthropic
summary: OpenAI is trying to attract private equity firms, as this could strengthen its enterprise strategy and secure additional capital for growth. The company is offering significant incentives, including favorable investment terms and access to its latest artificial intelligence (AI) models, as part of its joint-venture discussions aimed at accelerating technology adoption.
